title: Minyamiyn #4509
definition:
Miniamin = "from the right hand"

 1) a Levite in the time of Hezekiah
 2) a priest who was present at the dedication of the wall of
    Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Miniamin = "from the right hand"

 1) a Levite in the time of Hezekiah
 2) a priest who was present at the dedication of the wall of
    Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah

    NASB:  from the right hand, the name of several Isr.
